name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Driven Software Developer specializing in full-stack development and scalable solutions.
about: Leveraging 2.7 years of experience, I am a passionate Software Developer with a strong focus on building robust and scalable full-stack applications. My expertise spans modern web technologies, database management, and cloud platforms. I have a keen interest in AI/ML, demonstrated by achieving Semi-Finalist status in Flipkart Grid 5.0 and being selected for Amazon ML Summer School 2024. I am committed to leveraging technology to solve complex problems and deliver innovative solutions.
highlights: Collaborated with a team of four to develop an AI/ML-based Flipkart recommender system, achieving Semi-Finalist status in Flipkart Grid 5.0.
Selected for Amazon ML Summer School 2024.

projects.name: Contest-Saathi
projects.description: Developed a dynamic web application providing personalized email notifications for coding contests and real-time updates. Successfully cultivated a dedicated user base of over 50 active subscribers, enhancing engagement and timely participation.

projects.name: Insight Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a Cobra-based CLI tool to streamline user interaction with Gemini AI, significantly enhancing command-line efficiency. This solution integrates advanced natural language processing capabilities to deliver real-time, intelligent responses directly within the terminal.
